title: WWI & WWII pistols & revolves
description: A resource pack that adds pistols and revolvers from WWI and WWII period, works by renaming the crossbow
body:
3D resourse pack which changing texture of crossbow.

Versions prior to 1.21.5 require optifine or CIT resevn.

**Сurrently done:**
- **Mauser C96**
- **Mauser C96 with stock**
- **Mauser C96 carbine**
- **Type 26 revolver**
- **Nagan M1895**
- **Bodeo M1889**
- **Colt M1917**
- **P08 Luger**
- **P08 Luger carbine**
- **Nambu t14**

**In the future:**
- TT-30
- Colt M1911
- Lahti L-35

 **You can suggest others in my discord.**
  
  
  
Rename crossbow on anvil to "Mauser C96", "Mauser C96 with stock", "Mauser C96 carbine", "Type 26 revolver", "Nagan M1895", "Bodeo M1889", "Colt M1917", "P08 Luger", "P08 Luger carbine", "Nambu Type 14";

and enjoy playing with the pistols or revolves from this pack.
